nodes.label: Pycoffeemaker (Coffeemaker)
nodes.rationale: Main backend for Project Cafecito: collect web content, enrich with NLP/LLMs, ship to downstream DBs. Workers are independent and scheduled by run.py.

nodes.label: Asynchronous unaware orchestrators
nodes.rationale: Workers run asynchronously and remain unaware of each other; run.py schedules them in parallel or sequence. Enables independent scaling and fault isolation.

nodes.label: Fault-tolerant state machine
nodes.rationale: Persist worker states to avoid redoing work after shutdown or failure; processing states and raw data live in a flexible persistent DB.

nodes.label: Insert/delete over update
nodes.rationale: State machine prefers read, insert, delete over update for higher IO throughput and write concurrency.

nodes.label: COLLECTOR worker mode
nodes.rationale: IO-heavy ingest from RSS, APIs, Reddit, scraped pages; writes collected state via datacollectors.

nodes.label: EMBEDDER worker mode
nodes.rationale: Compute-heavy vector embeddings on article content.

nodes.label: EXTRACTOR worker mode
nodes.rationale: Named entities via GLiNER (people, companies, regions, tickers).

nodes.label: DIGESTOR worker mode
nodes.rationale: Structured digests (gist, highlights) via LLM micro-agents.

nodes.label: CLASSIFIER worker mode
nodes.rationale: Topic categories, sentiments, and related-article clustering using factory/classifications.yaml and ClassificationCache.

nodes.label: CONSOLIDATOR worker mode
nodes.rationale: Groups related digests into composite briefings/signals.

nodes.label: PORTER worker mode
nodes.rationale: IO-heavy push of finished beans/chatters/publishers to Beansack (PG) and Cupboard.

nodes.label: PROCESSING_CACHE
nodes.rationale: Connection string for default PostgreSQL state cache (pgcache.StateCache / AsyncStateCache).

nodes.label: CLASSIFICATION_CACHE
nodes.rationale: Vector store (zvec) backing CLASSIFIER via clscache.ClassificationCache.

nodes.label: Bean
nodes.rationale: Atomic article unit (news, blog, post); fields produced incrementally by different workers.

nodes.label: Chatter
nodes.rationale: Social engagement for a bean URL (likes, comments, forum).

nodes.label: Publisher
nodes.rationale: Site/source metadata (favicon, RSS, description).

nodes.label: Composite
nodes.rationale: Consolidated briefing spanning multiple related beans.

nodes.label: Sip
nodes.rationale: Cupboard normalized content unit (UUID from URL) for Cortado/Espresso pipelines.

nodes.label: Mug
nodes.rationale: Espresso RSS entry container holding full content, highlights (TLDR), and sip id references.

nodes.label: Beansack
nodes.rationale: Primary article store for Cafecito Beans (PostgreSQL/pgvector and other backends).

nodes.label: Cupboard
nodes.rationale: Cortado store for Sip records with embeddings and digests.

nodes.label: Espresso
nodes.rationale: UI that may import or consume Coffeemaker output; RSS at espresso.cafecito.tech used in cupboard population tests.

nodes.label: Bean processing states
nodes.rationale: collected → embedded → classified/clustered → extracted/digested → consolidated → beansacked/cupboarded.

nodes.label: Topic classification taxonomy
nodes.rationale: Hierarchical category labels (AI, cybersecurity, cloud, finance, etc.) used by CLASSIFIER.

nodes.label: Sentiment labels
nodes.rationale: negative, neutral, and positive sentiment buckets with fine-grained sub-labels for classification.

nodes.label: RSS feed sources
nodes.rationale: Thousands of RSS URLs under sources.rss; default COLLECTOR_SOURCES input.

nodes.label: Reddit subreddit sources
nodes.rationale: Subreddit names collected via PRAW/asyncpraw APIs.

nodes.label: YCombinator Hacker News API sources
nodes.rationale: Firebase HN story list JSON endpoints for top/new stories.

nodes.label: entry.title
nodes.rationale: Primary title field for RSS entries in well-formed feeds.

nodes.label: entry.content
nodes.rationale: Full content with fallback chain through content:encoded and dc_content.

nodes.label: pgcache service
nodes.rationale: pgvector/pg17 on port 5433 for vector state/classification experiments.

nodes.label: localmongo service
nodes.rationale: MongoDB community server on 27017 for legacy worker images.

nodes.label: azurite service
nodes.rationale: Azure Storage emulator for blob/queue used by digestor-era workers.

nodes.label: localcrawler (crawl4ai)
nodes.rationale: crawl4ai sidecar on port 11235 for web scraping in compose dev stack.

nodes.label: localindexer (legacy INDEXER)
nodes.rationale: Legacy MODE=INDEXER image; README notes current run.py modes differ (EMBEDDER, etc.).

nodes.label: create_embedder
nodes.rationale: Factory selecting embedder backend from model path prefix (HF, vllm://, onnx://, remote API).

nodes.label: create_micro_agent
nodes.rationale: Structured LLM extraction with Pydantic output_model (Digest, Briefing).

nodes.label: EntityExtractor
nodes.rationale: GLiNER-based NER; default model knowledgator/modern-gliner-bi-base-v1.0.

nodes.label: Digest schema
nodes.rationale: Pydantic Digest output for digestor/extractor/consolidator pipelines.

nodes.label: create_client
nodes.rationale: Unified factory for postgres, mongodb, duckdb, lance, ducklake backends.

nodes.label: PUBLISHED graph edge
nodes.rationale: Experimental SurrealDB relation linking sources to events (articles).

nodes.label: SAME_AS graph edge
nodes.rationale: Dedup/similarity edge between event nodes explored in Surreal graph queries.

hyperedges.label: SQL trending and aggregation query stack
